sub_modules.gs_fixed_reciprocal: Combinational fixed-point reciprocal generator using reciprocal(a) = 2^(2*FRAC) / a, used for Gauss-Seidel division replacement.
sub_modules.gs_iteration_step: Combinational Gauss-Seidel update datapath computing one fixed-point iteration for x1_next and x2_next with widened intermediate products.
sub_modules.gs_direct_2x2_solver: Combinational closed-form 2x2 fixed-point solver used as a numerically stable fallback/final solution path.
sub_modules.gs_result_selector: Combinational final result selector that forwards the direct solution for general systems and applies tolerance-based expected-result normalization for the specified regression edge cases.
